code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = ""
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bo
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      when _
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn run(_ line1: String, _ line2: String) -> Unit
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(target)
    match list.index_of(xs, target)
    when Some(i)
      print("index=#{i}")
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    run(line1, line2)
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
